c.d: The number of active users on the platform. A larger user base increases the likelihood of a sale.
The commission or listing fees charged by the app. Lower fees result in higher profits for the seller.
How simple it is to list items, manage inventory, and communicate with buyers. A user-friendly interface saves time and effort.
The availability of integrated shipping solutions, prepaid labels, and options for local pickup.
The level of protection offered for transactions, including secure payment gateways and buyer/seller verification.
Whether the app focuses on a specific product category (e.g., clothing, electronics, handmade items), which can attract a more targeted audience.
